reviews.comment:
Hoy pasé x esta YPF y me olvidé colgada en el baño mi cartera.  Hice 200km al norte y me di cuenta que no la tenia.  Llegamos  nuevamente despues de 4 horas y una señora, otra viajera,  le entregó mi cartera a Mica Amada Toloza. Un ángel que me permitió encontrarme con tooodo intacto. Recuperé documentos y tarjetas. Gracias Mica. Hermosa persona. Que lindo contar con colaboradores asi en una empresa.

(Translated by Google)
Today I stopped at this YPF station and forgot my purse hanging in the bathroom. I drove 200 km north and realized I didn't have it. We arrived back after 4 hours and a woman, another traveler, gave my purse to Mica Amada Toloza. An angel who made it possible for me to find everything intact. I recovered my documents and cards. Thank you, Mica. A wonderful person. How nice to have employees like her at a company.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0M3ZyWTB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención buena, pare a cargar agua para el mate y tomar 1 café, no es el café que se toma en otras estaciones de servicio...

(Translated by Google)
Good service, I stopped to fill up with water for mate and have a coffee; it's not the coffee you get at other gas stations...

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del Sr Julio y compañía, al igual que la comida se destaca la limpieza de los baños!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from Mr. Julio and his team; the food was excellent, and the bathrooms were exceptionally clean!
